description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a rich brown finish, featuring two drawers on the left side with metallic handles and four short, light-colored legs. The desk has a flat, spacious top surface, currently holding a single white sheet of paper placed near one corner. The front of the desk is open beneath the tabletop, providing legroom for a seated user, while the back and right side are fully enclosed with solid panels. The drawers are flush with the front face, and the handles are rectangular and metallic, contrasting with the wood. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for both professional and home environments. The desk appears sturdy and well-constructed, with a smooth, clean surface and no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A sturdy brown wooden desk with two left-side drawers, metallic handles, and a spacious flat top, currently holding a white sheet of paper. The front is open for legroom, while the back and right side are enclosed.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metallic handles on the left, open legroom space, and a white sheet of paper on the top right.
description_view_1: Left side view showing the solid side panel and the white sheet of paper on the desk's surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the fully enclosed back panel and the white sheet of paper on the top left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid right panel and the white sheet of paper on the desk's surface.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open legroom is intended to face the user, with the solid back panel facing away; drawers are on the user's left.
